channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Congressional Republicans target PBS, NPR funding in contentious hearing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A House Republican pushing the Trump administration's government efficiency efforts called for dismantling and defunding the nation's public broadcasting system following a contentious hearing Wednesday featuring the heads of PBS and NPR.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The White House security breach raises concerns among some military spouses and veterans
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — When Alyssa Myatt’s husband served on an aircraft carrier last year, she and other U.S. Navy spouses had to follow strict security protocols that meant driving to the ship’s home port just to learn that its deployment was being extended.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and ALLEN G. BREED, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Kansas measles cases double to 23 and new Ohio outbreak sickens 10
item.description: A measles outbreak in Kansas doubled in less than a week to 23 cases and has "a possible link” to outbreaks in Texas and New Mexico that have sickened more than 370, the state health department said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chewing gum releases thousands of microplastics into body, study finds
item.description: A recent study found that chewing gum can release up to thousands of microplastics per piece and potentially be ingested, according to researchers.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, KRON4

item.title: Trump admin potential travel ban concerning airlines: Editor
item.description: "Even the announcement that they're being proposed on the list is sending a chill through the travel industry.
item.dc:creator: Markie Martin, NewsNation

item.title: Family unknowingly had rare, valuable painting for 150 years
item.description: A painting hanging in a French family's living room turned out to be far more valuable than just another trinket or heirloom.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas grand jury indicts man who allegedly murdered mother of 9
item.description: Texas investigators used DNA forensics to link a man serving time for an unrelated crime, to the murder of a mother of nine who was killed in 2016.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Turkish student at Tufts University detained, video shows masked people handcuffing her
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — A Turkish national who is a doctoral student at Tufts University has been detained by federal agents without explanation, her lawyer said on Wednesday. Rumeysa Ozturk, 30, had just left her home in Somerville to meet with friends Tuesday night when she was detained by U.S.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, KATHY McCORMACK and MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NTSB chairwoman says reviewing the data after midair crash may prevent the next aviation accident
item.description: Someone should have spotted the alarming number of near misses in the skies over the nation's capital before the fatal midair collision that killed 67 people in January, and reviewing the data now could prevent future crashes, according to the head of the agency investigating the crash.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: More evacuations as wildfires burn in the Carolinas. Forecasts aren't encouraging for firefighters
item.description: More people have been asked to join the hundreds told to leave their homes in the North Carolina and South Carolina mountains as wildfires spread and the forecast for the rest of the week is not encouraging — dry and windy.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Turkish student at Tufts University detained, video shows masked agents handcuffing her
item.description: Rumeysa Ozturk's whereabouts are unknown and no known charges have been filed against her, her lawyer said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Hawaii doctor accused of trying to kill his wife during hike
item.description: Police say the man tried to push his wife off the trail and allegedly hit her in the head multiple times with a rock.
item.dc:creator: Jill Kuramoto, NewsNation

item.title: Massive RV parking lot in California city taken over by homeless squatters
item.description: The homeless have taken over a luxury RV parking lot in the City of Industry, California. Rampant crime, including burglaries, have since plagued the area.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Watch live: Trump speaks at White House event honoring Women's History Month
item.description: "I am especially proud to acknowledge and celebrate the brilliant and talented female trailblazers in my Administration," Trump wrote earlier in a statement.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, NewsNation

item.title: Education Department restores IDR student loan applications
item.description: The applications were put on pause after a federal appeals court ruled the Biden administration’s Saving on Valuable Education (SAVE) income-drive repayment (IDR) plan was illegal.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California freeway worker, father of 2, killed in construction zone
item.description: “Like a firefighter or police officer, you kiss them goodbye,” Jose's wife, Carla Mantecon said. “It’s a very dangerous job.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, NewsNation

item.title: Kermit the Frog to give commencement address at University of Maryland
item.description: Prominent political figures and lawmakers on the commencement speaker circuit are about to have some friendly, froggy competition.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ex-NFL player charged after 190 dogs seized from Oklahoma dog fighting venture
item.description: An Oklahoma man is facing federal charges after officials seized 190 dogs from an animal fighting venture, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hawaii doctor accused of trying to kill his wife during hike
item.description: Police say the man tried to push his wife off the trail and allegedly hit her in the head multiple times with a rock.
item.dc:creator: Jill Kuramoto, Fox 5

item.title: Atlantic publishes Trump Cabinet group chat messages
item.description: The Atlantic has published the Signal group chat messages among national security leaders that were inadvertently shared with Editor-in-Chief Jeffrey Goldberg, noting administration officials said Tuesday they were not classified.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Stepmother accused of holding Connecticut man captive for over 20 years appears in court
item.description: Kimberly Sullivan arrived at Waterbury Superior Court just before 10 a.m., where she was expected to plead not guilty to kidnapping and assault charges, according to her lawyers. But the case was continued until Friday.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NPR, PBS facing DOGE subcommittee over alleged liberal lean
item.description: At stake are potential cost cuts for both companies, which are partially funded by the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Vance to accompany wife to Greenland amid backlash
item.description: Vance’s announcement adds another layer of tension to an already fraught atmosphere surrounding his wife’s planned visit.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: ICE in Boston nabs previously deported Dominican fentanyl trafficker, child rape convict, murderers
item.description: ICE agents in the Boston area have arrested previously deported fentanyl migrant traffickers, a child rape convict and several migrants wanted for murder.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dollar Tree selling Family Dollar to a pair of private equity firms for $1 billion
item.description: Dollar Tree is selling Family Dollar to a pair of private equity firms for $1 billion after unsuccessfully trying to incorporate the bargain chain for a decade.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN AP Business News, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Perpetual adoration is a growing Catholic trend. A Holy Year event is scheduled for the weekend
item.description: HIALEAH, Fla. (AP) — Twice a week, Luisa Arguello and her husband spend from 2 a.m. to 3 a.m. praying in the perpetual adoration chapel at St. Benedict Catholic Church, tucked on a quiet palm-fringed residential street in the Miami suburb of Hialeah. “Your body clock gets used to it.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: iPad submerged 5 years in London's River Thames helps unlock murder plot
item.description: The iPad was covered in dark mud after five years at the bottom of England's longest river, the Thames, but it was the chip inside that helped police crack a five-year-old murder plot.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Senate confirms Trump's nominee to run NIH
item.description: The Senate on Tuesday confirmed health researcher Jay Bhattacharya as the next leader of the National Institutes of Health (NIH). Bhattacharya was confirmed on a party- line vote, 53 to 47.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Trump signs order seeking to overhaul US elections, including requiring proof of citizenship
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump on Tuesday signed a sweeping executive action to overhaul elections in the U.S., including requiring documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote in federal elections and demanding that all ballots be received by Election Day. The order says the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON and CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Family of Riley Strain files wrongful death lawsuit against Delta Chi fraternity
item.description: Riley Strain, who was reported missing on March 8, 2024, during a fraternity trip, was found deceased in Nashville's Cumberland River.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Judge orders a June trial for US government's felony case against Boeing
item.description: A federal judge in Texas has set a June trial date for the U.S. government's years-old conspiracy case against Boeing for misleading regulators about the 737 Max jetliner before two of the planes crashed, killing 346 people. U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge temporarily blocks Trump admin from deporting South Korean Columbia student
item.description: A federal judge Tuesday blocked the Trump administration from deporting a Columbia University student who participated in pro-Palestinian demonstrations at the school.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Israeli hostages' families sue Mahmoud Khalil, Columbia organizers as alleged 'Hamas' propaganda arm' in NYC
item.description: The families of Israeli hostages are suing Ivy League anti-Israel ringleader Mahmoud Khalil and other Columbia University protest organizers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge won't lift block on Trump use of Alien Enemies Act to deport Venezuelans
item.description: U.S. District Court Judge James Boasberg declined to lift a restraining order barring the Trump administration from using the Alien Enemies Act to deport Venezuelans, determining migrants are likely to succeed in pushing for hearings on whether they are in a gang.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WGN 9
